qualifying_vulnerability_assessments.title: Binary data endpoint lacks per-object authorization enabling IDOR access to any execution's output
qualifying_vulnerability_assessments.advisory_match_reason: This finding concerns missing per-object authorization in GET /rest/binary-data/ for execution binary data, not the advisory's dynamic-node-parameters credential authorization bypass and foreign credential replay path.

qualifying_vulnerability_assessments.title: Unauthenticated-after-login SSRF via workflow import-from-url endpoint allows internal service data exfiltration
qualifying_vulnerability_assessments.advisory_match_reason: This finding concerns GET /rest/workflows/from-url fetching attacker-supplied URLs without SSRF protection, not the advisory's dynamic-node-parameters endpoint using another user's credential ID and replaying that credential.

target_advisory_judgement.reason: No qualifying finding identifies the advisory-described vulnerable code or root cause. The advisory is a missing authorization check in n8n dynamic-node-parameters endpoints that permits an authenticated shared-workflow user to supply a foreign credential ID, causing the backend to decrypt and replay another user's credential to a caller-controlled destination. The qualifying findings instead cover an unrelated binary-data IDOR and an unrelated workflow import-from-url SSRF.
evidence: Advisory GHSA-r4v6-9fqc-w5jr describes dynamic-node-parameters endpoints failing to authorize supplied credential references before helper execution uses the credential against a caller-controlled URL.
binary-data-idor/vulnerability_report.json identifies GET /rest/binary-data/ streaming execution binary data after only ID format validation.
ssrf-workflow-import-from-url/vulnerability_report.json identifies GET /rest/workflows/from-url directly calling axios.get(query.url) without SSRF protection.
blockers_to_higher_tier: No qualifying finding matches the advisory-described dynamic-node-parameters credential authorization bypass, so Tier1, Tier2, and Tier3 do not apply.
